# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-net-service-a
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-net-service-a
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-net-service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-net-service-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-net-service-a:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /livez
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-net-service-b
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-net-service-b
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-net-service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-net-service-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-net-service-b:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: tcp
              containerPort: 9000
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9000
            initialDelaySeconds: 3
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 9000
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 512Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-net-service-c
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: direct-net-service-c
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-net-service-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-net-service-c
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          image: ghcr.io/example/direct-net-service-c:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: grpc
              containerPort: 7070
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 7070
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 7070
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1500m
              memory: 1Gi
